nodes.title: Prompt_format
widgets_values:
### 使用本地模型 例如ollama 或Comfy的text generate节点建议选择llm, 使用API节点选择api

When using local models such as Ollama or Comfy’s text generation nodes, select “llm”; when using API nodes, select “api” for the request.

nodes.title: Image To Prompt
widgets_values:
### 这里也可以使用 API反推节点，如果使用api方式则将 system_prompt 和user_prompt都连接到那个节点上
You can also use the API to reverse-lookup a node here. If you use the API method, connect both `system_prompt` and `user_prompt` to that node.

nodes.title: Download Models
widgets_values:
[Download Diffusion Models](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Bernini-R/tree/main/diffusion_models)

[Download Loras](https://huggingface.co/rzgar/Bernini-R-LightX2V-4step-loras/tree/main)

[Download Frame Inp Model](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/frame_interpolation/tree/main)

### 使用int8_convert模型建议cuda版本130以上，可提升速度30%

When using the int8_convert model, CUDA version 130 or higher is recommended, as it can improve performance by 30%.

nodes.title: MultiTrack Editor Guide
widgets_values:
## 1.在影片轨中点击+号图标添加视频，建议每段时长不超过10秒

Click the + icon in the video track to add a video. We recommend that each clip be no longer than 10 seconds.

## 2.修改每片段任务类型为 编辑
Change the task type for each segment to “Edit”

groups.title: Concat reference images and 3 Frames From video
